data.title: Bipartisan Lawmakers Aim To Break Up Health Care Giants With New Legislation
data.description: Pharmacy-benefit managers (PBMs) have been scrutinized for their role in drug distribution for years. Now a bipartisan group of lawmakers is threatening to break up the companies behind these so-called drug middlemen.

data.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In Fabrinet 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Macy's Employee Hid $151 Million In Costs Over Several Years
data.description: Macy's uncovered $151M in falsely recorded expenses due to one employee's misconduct. The company is working to regain trust and improve operations.

data.title: Donald Trump To Be Named TIME Person Of The Year, Beating Out Harris, Musk, Middleton, Netanyahu: Report
data.description: Donald Trump to be named TIME Person of the Year award for 2024 according to a report and will ring the NYSE opening bell to celebrate Thursday.
